careerSection1.description: Join a team of passionate innovators dedicated to transforming supply chain management for businesses worldwide.

items.title: Great Team
items.description: Work with talented, passionate people who support your growth.

items.title: Fast Growth
items.description: Be part of a rapidly growing company with endless opportunities.

items.title: Work-Life Balance
items.description: Flexible hours, remote options, and a culture that cares.

items.title: Learning & Development
items.description: Continuous learning opportunities and career development programs.

items.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
items.description: Build responsive and performant user interfaces for our inventory management platform.

items.title: Product Manager
items.description: Drive product strategy and roadmap for our core inventory management features.

items.title: DevOps Engineer
items.description: Build and maintain our cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure.

items.title: UX/UI Designer
items.description: Create intuitive and beautiful experiences for our logistics platform.

items.title: Customer Success Manager
items.description: Help our customers get the most value from our platform.

items.title: Sales Development Representative
items.description: Generate and qualify leads for our sales team.

life.title: Life at Sazzad
life.description: We believe that great work happens when people feel valued, supported, and inspired. Our culture is built on collaboration, innovation, and a shared passion for solving complex challenges.

items.title: Health & Wellness
items.description: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage

items.title: Remote-First
items.description: Work from anywhere with home office stipend

items.title: Flexible Hours
items.description: Create a schedule that works for you

items.title: Learning Budget
items.description: $2,000/year for courses and conferences

cta.title: Ready to Make an Impact?
cta.description: Join us in transforming the future of supply chain management.

careerSection2.description: Join a team of passionate innovators dedicated to transforming supply chain management for businesses worldwide.

search.placeholder: Search jobs by title, department, or keyword...

items.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
items.description: Build responsive and performant user interfaces for our inventory management platform using React and modern web technologies.

items.title: Product Manager
items.description: Drive product strategy and roadmap for our core inventory management features, working closely with engineering and design.

items.title: DevOps Engineer
items.description: Build and maintain our cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure, ensuring high availability and scalability.

items.title: UX/UI Designer
items.description: Create intuitive and beautiful experiences for our logistics platform, from wireframes to high-fidelity prototypes.

items.title: Customer Success Manager
items.description: Help our customers get the most value from our platform through onboarding, training, and ongoing support.

items.title: Sales Development Representative
items.description: Generate and qualify leads for our sales team through outbound prospecting and inbound follow-up.

items.title: Backend Engineer
items.description: Design and implement scalable backend services for our inventory management platform.

items.title: Marketing Manager
items.description: Develop and execute marketing strategies to drive brand awareness and lead generation.

items.title: Data Scientist
items.description: Apply machine learning to optimize inventory forecasting and demand planning for our customers.

items.title: Collaborative
items.description: We believe the best ideas come from working together across teams and disciplines.

items.title: Global Mindset
items.description: Our team spans the globe, bringing diverse perspectives to everything we do.

items.title: Excellence
items.description: We strive for excellence in our work, our products, and our customer relationships.

cta.title: Don't See the Right Role?
cta.description: We're always looking for talented people to join our team. Send us your resume and we'll keep you in mind for future opportunities.

careerSection3.description: Join a team of passionate innovators dedicated to transforming how businesses manage inventory and logistics worldwide.

featuredRole.title: Senior Product Manager - AI/ML
featuredRole.description: Lead the development of our AI-powered inventory forecasting and demand planning features, working with a world-class team of engineers and data scientists.

items.title: Comprehensive Health
items.description: Medical, dental, and vision coverage for you and your family

items.title: Remote-First
items.description: Work from anywhere with home office stipend

items.title: Flexible Hours
items.description: Create a schedule that works for your life

items.title: Learning Budget
items.description: $2,500/year for courses, books, and conferences

items.title: Meal Stipend
items.description: Monthly credits for local restaurants

items.title: Celebrations
items.description: Birthday off and quarterly team events

members.name: Sarah Chen
members.quote: The best part of working here is the collaborative culture. Everyone's ideas are valued, regardless of seniority.

members.name: Michael Rodriguez
members.quote: I've grown more here in one year than in five years at my previous job. The learning opportunities are incredible.

members.name: Emma Watson
members.quote: Helping customers succeed and seeing their businesses grow is the most rewarding part of my job.

members.name: James Kim
members.quote: Working with real-world supply chain data to build ML models that actually make a difference - this is why I got into tech.
